notes: Client-server application development environment (CADE); cross-platform Windows/OS2/Mac
Dual-track: traditional client-server + Net client-server; 4 components: dev tools, db tools, lifecycle mgmt, components
OMNIS extension adding TCP, FTP, SMTP, POP3, HTTP and HTML capabilities
Serves OMNIS apps to web browsers via CGI/HTML

Reusable plug-in components for Net apps; precursor to modern web component ecosystems
Referenced as market's dominant view of Net development at time; OMNIS could generate Java-equivalent code
Web markup language; Blyth's tools generated HTML dynamically
